_readme: Matches tests/fixtures/sample_policy.pdf (a fake Acme Corp employee handbook). Recall/MRR are computed by checking whether 'expected_keywords' phrases appear in the text of retrieved chunks -- NOT by matching chunk_id, since chunk_ids are randomly generated UUIDs that differ every time the corpus is re-ingested (e.g. a fresh CI database each run). This makes the eval set portable across any environment as long as the same fixture PDF is ingested first.

questions.question: What is the maximum number of paid sick days per year?
How many vacation days do full-time employees get in their first year?
What is the process for submitting an expense for reimbursement?
What is the notice period required for resignation?
How many vacation days do employees get after three years?
What is the remote work policy for contractors?
questions.notes: Handbook explicitly excludes contractors from this policy; a good answer states that gap rather than guessing.

questions.question: How many days per week can employees work remotely, and does this apply to vendors?
What is the company's policy on cryptocurrency compensation?
Can employees bring pets to the office on weekends?
Does the company offer a four-day work week option?
